name: Servo RTU KS100
description:
KS100 伺服 Modbus RTU 工具模块 (固定 8N1)
KS100 servo Modbus RTU utility module (8N1 only)

Slave Address.description:
从站地址 (1~254, 用于所有 Modbus 命令)
Slave address (1~254) used for all Modbus commands

Get Communication.description:
自动探测伺服参数 (固定从站 1, 扫描 baud). 完成后若伺服非 8N1 会自动改为 8N1.
Probe servo (slave 1, all baud). Forces 8N1 if servo is not 8N1.

Test Values.description:
诊断: dump local.values 树 + 测试 set/get
Diagnostic: dump local.values tree + test set/get

Slave Address.description:
检测到的伺服从站地址 (JS 自动更新)
Detected servo slave address (auto-updated by JS)

Baud Rate.description:
检测到的伺服波特率 (JS 自动更新)
Detected servo baud rate (auto-updated by JS)

Protocol.description:
检测到的伺服协议模式 (JS 自动更新)
Detected servo protocol (auto-updated by JS)

Last Response.description:
最后一条/组命令的 16 进制 RX 消息, 多条分行
Last command's RX hex (multi-line for multi-frame)

Send Raw.description:
发送原始 Modbus RTU 命令 (自动追加 CRC16)
Send raw Modbus RTU command (auto CRC16)

Hex Command.description:
不含 CRC 的十六进制字节
Hex bytes without CRC

Get Communication.description:
探测伺服通信参数 (固定从站 1, 扫描所有 baud)
Probe servo (slave 1, all baud)

Set Baud Rate.description:
设置伺服波特率 (写 FA-72 + 软复位, 协议保持 8N1)
Set servo baud rate (writes FA-72 + soft reset, protocol stays 8N1)

Set Slave Address.description:
修改伺服从站地址 (写 FA-71). 当前站号取自参数面板的 Slave Address.
Set servo slave address (writes FA-71). Current slave read from Slave Address parameter.

New Slave Address.description:
新的从站地址 (1~254)
New slave address
